header.title: Textarea
header.subtitle: Multi-line text field for longer form inputs. Supports labels, helper text, error states, and resize control.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A textarea is composed of an optional label, the multi-line text field, and optional helper or error text.

parts.label: Identifies the field. Rendered as a <label> with matching htmlFor. Optional but recommended for accessibility.
parts.field: The native <textarea> element. Accepts all standard HTML textarea attributes.
parts.helper: Helper or error message rendered below the field. Error text takes precedence over helper text.

states.title: States
states.description: The textarea inherits border and shadow from the design token system. Error state overrides the border and focus ring in red.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Three min-height presets. Use sm for compact note fields and lg when expecting longer input.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native <textarea> attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

props.label: Label displayed above the field.
props.size: Min-height preset: sm (64px), md (80px, default), lg (120px).
props.error: Error message shown in red below the field.
props.helperText: Hint shown below the field when there is no error.
props.placeholder: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.
props.extendsNote: Extends all native <textarea> attributes (rows, cols, maxLength, …).
